message:
Add Series str startswith/endswith/replace/lstrip/rstrip coverage

Adds harness support and 5 new fixtures for:
- series_str_startswith (FP-P2D-174)
- series_str_endswith (FP-P2D-175)
- series_str_replace (FP-P2D-176)
- series_str_lstrip (FP-P2D-177)
- series_str_rstrip (FP-P2D-178)

Coverage: 850 fixtures total, all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

+    SeriesStrRstrip,
     #[serde(rename = "dataframe_loc", alias = "data_frame_loc")]
     DataFrameLoc,
     #[serde(rename = "dataframe_iloc", alias = "data_frame_iloc")]

+        FixtureOperation::SeriesStrEndswith => {

+        FixtureOperation::SeriesStrReplace => {
